title: React.js Fundamentals
description: Learn the core concepts of React including components, props, state, hooks, and routing. Perfect for anyone starting their journey in frontend development with hands-on projects.

title: Acoustic Guitar for Beginners
description: Master basic chords, strumming patterns, and your first songs in just a few weeks. No prior experience needed — just bring your guitar and enthusiasm.

title: Conversational Spanish
description: Improve your Spanish speaking skills through real conversations. Focus on practical vocabulary, pronunciation, and cultural context. Native speaker from Mexico.

title: Photography Basics
description: Learn composition, lighting, and how to use your camera in manual mode. Works with DSLR, mirrorless, or even a smartphone camera. Includes practical assignments.

title: Italian Home Cooking
description: Authentic Italian recipes passed down through generations. Learn to make fresh pasta, classic sauces, and Italian breads. Family recipes from Tuscany.

title: Yoga & Mindfulness
description: Build strength, flexibility, and mental clarity through traditional yoga practices. Suitable for all body types. Includes meditation and breathing techniques.

title: Digital Marketing Essentials
description: Master SEO, social media marketing, and content strategy. Learn how to grow brands online with proven frameworks used by top marketing agencies.

title: Public Speaking Mastery
description: Overcome stage fright and deliver powerful presentations. Techniques used by TED speakers and Fortune 500 executives. Practical exercises in every session.

title: Graphic Design with Figma
description: Create stunning UI designs from scratch using Figma. Learn typography, color theory, and design systems. Build a portfolio while you learn.

title: Video Editing with Premiere Pro
description: Edit cinematic videos for YouTube, social media, and freelance projects. Learn color grading, transitions, audio mixing, and storytelling techniques.

title: JavaScript for Beginners
description: Start your coding journey with JavaScript. Variables, functions, arrays, objects, DOM manipulation, and ES6+ features. Build small projects as you learn.

title: Drawing & Sketching
description: Learn to see and draw the world around you. From basic shapes to portraits and landscapes. All you need is paper and a pencil to begin.

title: French Language Basics
description: Bonjour! Learn French from scratch with a native speaker from Paris. Pronunciation, grammar, and conversation practice in every session.

title: Strength Training Fundamentals
description: Build muscle and strength with proper form and progressive overload. Learn the science behind compound lifts. Suitable for home or gym workouts.

title: Music Production with Logic Pro
description: Produce professional-quality tracks from scratch. Learn mixing, mastering, sound design, and arrangement. Bring your songs to life.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Dive into Python for data analysis. Learn pandas, NumPy, and matplotlib through real datasets. Build dashboards and uncover insights from data.

title: Creative Writing Workshop
description: Find your voice as a writer. Short story craft, character development, dialogue, and self-editing. Weekly writing prompts to keep you inspired.

title: Hip Hop Dance Basics
description: Learn fundamental hip hop moves, grooves, and freestyle techniques. Build confidence and rhythm in a fun, judgment-free environment.

title: Chess Strategy & Openings
description: Level up your chess from casual to competitive. Learn classical openings, middlegame tactics, and endgame techniques. FIDE-rated coach.

title: Watercolor Painting
description: Discover the magic of watercolors. Learn color theory, brush techniques, and how to capture light and atmosphere in your paintings.

title: Vocal Coaching for Singers
description: Develop your singing voice with proper technique. Learn breath control, range expansion, and performance skills. Suitable for all genres.

title: Stock Market Investing 101
description: Learn to invest wisely in the stock market. Understand fundamentals, technical analysis, and risk management. Build a diversified portfolio.

title: Japanese for Beginners
description: Konnichiwa! Start your Japanese journey with hiragana, katakana, and basic conversation. Learn cultural context alongside the language.

title: UI/UX Design Principles
description: Master the principles of user-centered design. Wireframing, prototyping, user research, and usability testing. Build a professional UX portfolio.

title: Calisthenics & Bodyweight Training
description: Build strength using just your bodyweight. Push-ups, pull-ups, dips, and progressions toward muscle-ups and handstands. No gym required.

title: Indian Home Cooking
description: Authentic North and South Indian recipes made simple. Master spice blends, curries, breads, and street food classics from a passionate home chef.

title: Node.js & Backend Development
description: Build production-ready APIs with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Learn authentication, deployment, and best practices used by top startups.

title: Salsa Dancing for Couples
description: Feel the rhythm of Latin music! Learn fundamental salsa patterns, partner work, and styling. Perfect for couples or solo learners with a partner.

title: Mindful Meditation Practice
description: Cultivate inner peace through guided meditation. Techniques for anxiety, focus, and emotional balance. Suitable for absolute beginners.

title: Freelance Writing for Income
description: Turn your writing into a sustainable income stream. Pitching clients, finding niches, setting rates, and scaling your freelance writing business.
